zh.Launceston, Cornwall, England: 英國可瓦爾勞斯頓 聖 瑪麗 抹大拉的
zh.Pickwell, Leicestershire, England: 英國萊希斯特斯爾皮可維爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabella Pidekeswell於1257年出生在英國戴文格奧智哈姆時，她的父親Robert de Pidekeswell53歲，母親Mrs. Robert Pidekeswell47歲。她和Sir Mauger St Aubyn III至少有4個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1308年之後，埋葬在英國戴文格奧智哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Isabella
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabella Pidekeswell was born in 1257, in Georgeham, Devon, England, her father, Robert de Pidekeswell, was 53 and her mother, Mrs. Robert Pidekeswell, was 47. She had at least 4 sons and 2 daughters with Sir Mauger St Aubyn III. She died after 1308, and was buried in Georgeham, Devon, England.

fr.Launceston, Cornwall, England: Launceston St Mary Magdalene, Cornouailles, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabella Pidekeswell est née en 1257, à Georgeham, Devon, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Pidekeswell, avait 53 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Robert Pidekeswell, avait 47 ans. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles avec Sir Mauger St Aubyn III. Elle est décédée après 1308, et a été enterrée à Georgeham, Devon, Angleterre.

Sie hatte mit Sir Mauger St Aubyn III mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb nach 1308 und wurde in Georgeham, Devon, England begraben.

Lei avuto almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie con Sir Mauger St Aubyn III. Morì dopo il 1308, e fu sepolta a Georgeham, Devon, England.

ja.Georgeham, Devon, England: イギリスデボンジョージェハム
ja.lifeSummary: Isabella Pidekeswellが1257年にイギリスデボンジョージェハムで生まれた時，父Robert de Pidekeswellは53歳，母Mrs. Robert Pidekeswellは47歳であった。彼女はSir Mauger St Aubyn IIIとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1308年以後に死去し，イギリスデボンジョージェハムにて埋葬された。

ko.Launceston, Cornwall, England: 영국 코른월 로스스턴 스트 메리 막달레나
ko.lifeSummary: Isabella Pidekeswell(이)가 1257년 영국 데폰 조그함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Pidekeswell(은)는 53세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. Robert Pidekeswell(은)는 47세였다. 그녀는 Sir Mauger St Aubyn III(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1308년 이후 사망했으며 영국 데폰 조그함에 묻혔다.

ru.Launceston, Cornwall, England: лаунсестон ст мэри магдеилин, корнвалл, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabella Pidekeswell родилась в 1257 г. в местности джеоргэам, девон, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert de Pidekeswell было 53 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Robert Pidekeswell, 47. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери от Sir Mauger St Aubyn III. Она умерла после 1308 г. и была похоронена в местности джеоргэам, девон, Англия.
